title: Admin Dashboard - System Stats
description: Overview of system statistics, operational health, payments, compliance, and admin-level intelligence.

title: User Management - Create and Disable Users
description: User administration screen for staff/vendor accounts, statuses, role filters, and access governance. Existing-user disable controls are not exposed as a dedicated action in the current UI.

title: Create User - Invite and Assign Role
description: Admin-controlled onboarding form for creating a manager or official with department, region, status, and scoped permissions.

title: Role Management - RBAC
description: Role and permission matrix for assigning vendor, manager, official, and admin access scopes.

title: System Settings - Configuration Panel
description: Settings/configuration workspace for account preferences and operational configuration available through the system settings module.

title: Audit Logs and Activity Logs
description: Audit trail screen showing system events, actor activity, evidence payloads, and traceable operational records.

title: Manager Dashboard - Key Overview
description: Manager overview for approvals, complaints, payments, stalls, and daily operational priorities.

title: Vendor Approval and Rejection Screen
description: Vendor application review sheet with submitted details, documents, manager notes, and approval/rejection actions.

title: Stall Allocation Interface
description: Stall management workspace for inventory, occupancy, availability, assignment, and allocation decisions.

title: Complaints Management Page
description: Complaint queue for supervisors to review, prioritize, update status, and resolve market issues.

title: Payment and Fees Overview
description: Payment records and fee status workspace for manager-level financial monitoring.

title: Coordination and Announcement Posting
description: Coordination module with message history and a posting panel for operational updates or announcements.

title: Market Reports and Analytics View
description: Reports and analytics page for market performance, revenue, occupancy, and financial audit summaries.

title: Vendor Dashboard
description: Vendor self-service dashboard with payment obligations, stall status, complaints, and recent activity.

title: Vendor Registration Form
description: Vendor onboarding form for account details, identity data, market selection, product section, and verification documents.

title: Login Screen
description: Authentication screen used by vendors and staff to access the role-based platform.

title: Stall Details and Allocation View
description: Vendor-facing stall allocation page showing stall availability, current allocations, and application actions.

title: Payment Initiation Screen
description: Payment summary dialog used before opening Pesapal checkout for a documented sample utility charge.

title: Complaint Submission Form
description: Vendor complaint form for submitting market service issues with category, subject, description, and optional attachment.

title: Notifications and Messages View
description: Notification center for alerts, unread messages, payment updates, complaint updates, and delivery preferences.

title: Profile Settings Page
description: Vendor profile settings screen for contact details, market assignment, business section, and account information.

title: Official Dashboard
description: Official oversight dashboard for government operations, inspections, compliance, complaints, and regional market risk.

title: Market Overview Reports
description: Official reports workspace for market-level financial, occupancy, and operational summaries.

title: Revenue and Payment Tracking View
description: Billing and obligation oversight screen used for payment tracking and utility charge visibility.

title: Inspection or Compliance Monitoring Page
description: Audit and inspection evidence view for compliance monitoring and traceable government oversight.

title: Analytics and Summary Reports
description: Financial audit and analytics section showing summary reporting for official oversight.

title: Vendor Listings - Read-only View
description: Missing as a separate official screen. The current route map does not include /official/vendors; vendor listings are available to managers through /manager/vendors.
